svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1088px; height: 1px; padding-top: 18px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 52px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 52px; margin-left: 542px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(41, 41, 41), rgb(202, 202, 202)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(223, 223, 223));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 76px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: INTENT MANIFEST — IM-[ORG]-[YY]-[SEQ] v[N] Owner: [Role] Effective: [Date]

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a4a1a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a4a1a, #9cc59c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. STRATEGIC GOALS
Ranked organisational goals agents optimise toward · Priority order governs default trade-off resolution

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 177px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a3a5c;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a3a5c, #a7c3e0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. TRADE-OFF HIERARCHIES
Explicit precedence rules for resolving goal conflicts · e.g. Security > Compliance > Speed > Cost

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 234px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #6b2020;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6b2020, #f7b6b6); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. OPERATIONAL CONSTRAINTS (HARD)
Non-negotiable boundaries · Violation triggers halt and escalation · Not subject to trade-off resolution

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 291px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #5a2800;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5a2800, #e9be9c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. RISK APPETITE
Tolerance levels by risk category — financial · reputational · security · operational · compliance

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 348px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #5a4000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5a4000, #cbb57e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. DECISION THRESHOLDS
Autonomous (agent alone) · Council deliberation · Human approval — defined by decision type and risk level

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 403px; margin-left: 22px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6. GOVERNANCE
Manifest owner · Review cadence · Change approval process · Version history · Supersession rules

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 248, 248), rgb(24, 24, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(208, 208, 208), rgb(58, 58, 58));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 478px; height: 1px; padding-top: 456px; margin-left: 11px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Consumed at every agent decision point. Not a prompt — a policy document. Changes require governed approval.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 92px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1a4a1a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a4a1a, #9cc59c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. AUTHOR
Human intent author encodes goals, trade-off hierarchies, constraints, and risk appetite in structured form

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 167px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. VALIDATE
Governance review — manifest reflects current strategy · trade-off rules are consistent · constraints are complete and unambiguous

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 242px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1a3a5c;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a3a5c, #a7c3e0); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. PUBLISH
Manifest versioned and deployed to agent infrastructure · Prior version archived · All agents notified of new version

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(41, 41, 41), rgb(202, 202, 202)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(17, 17, 17), rgb(223, 223, 223));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 317px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. CONSUME
Agents reference manifest at each decision point · Outputs annotated with the manifest clause that authorised each decision

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 392px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5a4000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5a4000, #cbb57e); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. MONITOR
System logs intent-alignment decisions and escalation patterns · Clause-level clusters signal ambiguity or drift

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 528px; height: 1px; padding-top: 467px; margin-left: 541px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #5a2800;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#5a2800, #e9be9c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6. UPDATE
Human revises manifest in response to strategy shift or escalation patterns · Updated version re-enters VALIDATE

fill: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));
